name: Louise M. Davies Symphony Hall
note: Archive documents linked to this place; source labels honour the SFPL-vs-Democracy's-Library distinction.

documents.title: School of the Arts master plan : draft environmental impact report
documents.creator: San Francisco Unified School District
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1997 School of the Arts draft EIR whose parking analysis records Davies Hall's 2,743-seat capacity and an evening performance drawing 2,420 people (an 88 percent attendance rate).

documents.title: Civic Center study : cultural facilities plan, issues and finding report : draft for citizen review
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Dept. of City Planning
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1994 Civic Center cultural-facilities study listing Davies Hall's 2,743 seats, its role as the San Francisco Symphony's home, War Memorial trustee control, and roughly 30 rental days a year.

documents.title: East/West
documents.creator: East/West Pub. Co.
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1986 East/West newspaper announcement of an 'East Meets West' symphonic concert held at the Louise M. Davies Symphony Hall on March 7-8.
